message:
test(core): add conformance oracle suite s77 (871 lines, 10 scenarios)

New oracle-compare test file (conformance_oracle_s77.rs) that pits
fsqlite against rusqlite across ten areas identified by the planner as
under-covered in s55/s69:

  1. Multi-table JOINs with mixed aggregates
  2. Complex UPDATE / DELETE with subqueries and CTEs
  3. CASE expressions inside aggregates
  4. COALESCE chains with subqueries
  5. Multi-column ORDER BY with computed expressions
  6. INSERT ... SELECT with value transforms
  7. HAVING with complex predicates
  8. Self-referential CTEs
  9. Window functions: NTILE and PERCENT_RANK
 10. Cross-type comparison edge cases

Uses the existing oracle_compare() helper so any divergence between
fsqlite and rusqlite fails the test with a per-query diff. Tests that
hit known gaps can be #[ignore]'d individually as they land; this file
ships with them enabled so the gate catches regressions once features
are shipped.
